name: Salsa Alla Marinara
recipeIngredient: 1 large garlic clove, peeled and slightly crushed
1 lb fresh tomatoes, peeled and seeded
or 16 oz canned peeled tomatoes, drained
recipeInstructions:
This is based on a recipe from Italian cooking teacher Anna Teresa Callen. The sauce can be prepared in large batches and frozen.
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine all ingredients over moderate heat.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Discard the parsley and garlic; pour the sauce over freshly cooked pasta.
4. Dress with spaghetti or linguine (1 pound).
